evals.prompt:
Extract the event details:

Join us for the Annual Tech Summit hosted by Innovate Corp on Saturday, June 14, 2025 from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM at the San Francisco Convention Center, Hall B.
evals.expected_output: A JSON object with all five fields populated correctly.
assertions: The output is valid JSON or contains a valid JSON code block
The JSON contains a 'title' field with a value like 'Annual Tech Summit'
The JSON contains a 'date' field that includes '2025-06-14' or 'June 14, 2025' or '06/14/2025'
The JSON contains a 'time' field that mentions '9:00 AM' or '9:00' and '5:00 PM' or '17:00'
The JSON contains a 'location' field mentioning 'San Francisco Convention Center'
The JSON contains an 'organizer' field mentioning 'Innovate Corp'

evals.prompt:
Parse this into structured data:

Hey everyone! Quick reminder that our team retrospective is this Thursday at 3pm in the Birch conference room. — Sarah
evals.expected_output: A JSON object handling informal language, relative date, and an implicit organizer.
assertions: The output is valid JSON or contains a valid JSON code block
The JSON contains a 'title' field with a value like 'team retrospective' or 'Team Retrospective'
The JSON contains a 'date' field that references Thursday or indicates the date could not be fully resolved
The JSON contains a 'time' field mentioning '3:00 PM' or '3pm' or '15:00'
The JSON contains a 'location' field mentioning 'Birch conference room'
The JSON contains an 'organizer' field mentioning 'Sarah'

evals.prompt:
Extract event info:

The charity gala will be held at The Grand Ballroom, Hilton Downtown. Doors open at 6:30 PM. Black tie required.
evals.expected_output: A JSON object where missing fields (date, organizer) are handled gracefully with null or explicit 'not specified' values.
assertions: The output is valid JSON or contains a valid JSON code block
The JSON contains a 'title' field with a value like 'charity gala' or 'Charity Gala'
The JSON contains a 'date' field that is null, 'null', 'N/A', 'not specified', or 'unknown' since no date was provided
The JSON contains a 'time' field mentioning '6:30 PM' or '18:30'
The JSON contains a 'location' field mentioning 'Grand Ballroom' and 'Hilton'
The JSON contains an 'organizer' field that is null, 'null', 'N/A', 'not specified', or 'unknown' since no organizer was mentioned
The output does not fabricate a date or organizer that was not in the input

evals.prompt:
What are the event details here?

Dr. Emily Zhao from MIT will deliver the keynote 'AI and the Future of Healthcare' on March 3rd, 2026 at 2:00 PM EST. The talk will take place in Auditorium 1, Building 32, MIT Campus, Cambridge MA. A networking reception follows at 4:00 PM in the adjacent lounge. RSVP to events@mit.edu.
evals.expected_output: A JSON object or array capturing the keynote event. Bonus: captures the reception as a second event.
assertions: The output is valid JSON or contains a valid JSON code block
The JSON captures the keynote title 'AI and the Future of Healthcare'
The JSON contains a date referencing 'March 3' and '2026'
The JSON contains a time referencing '2:00 PM'
The JSON contains a location mentioning 'Auditorium 1' or 'Building 32' or 'MIT'
The JSON contains an organizer or speaker field mentioning 'Emily Zhao' or 'MIT'
The output mentions or captures the networking reception as a separate event or note

evals.prompt:
Parse the event:

Workshop: Introduction to Watercolor Painting
When: Every Tuesday in October, 10am–12pm
Where: Community Arts Center, Room 204
Instructor: Maria Gonzalez
Fee: $150 for the series
Register at artscentre.org/workshops
evals.expected_output: A JSON object handling a recurring event with a date range rather than a single date.
assertions: The output is valid JSON or contains a valid JSON code block
The JSON contains a 'title' field mentioning 'Introduction to Watercolor Painting' or 'Watercolor Painting'
The JSON contains a 'date' field that references 'every Tuesday in October' or 'Tuesdays in October' or lists the individual October Tuesdays
The JSON contains a 'time' field mentioning '10' and '12' in some format (10am-12pm, 10:00-12:00, etc.)
The JSON contains a 'location' field mentioning 'Community Arts Center' and 'Room 204'
The JSON contains an 'organizer' field mentioning 'Maria Gonzalez' (the instructor)

evals.prompt:
Extract structured event data from this email:

Subject: Board Meeting Rescheduled

Hi all,

Please note the Q2 board meeting has been moved from June 5 to June 12, 2025. Same time (10:00 AM) and place (HQ, 4th Floor Boardroom). Lunch will be provided.

Best,
James Liu
Corporate Secretary
evals.expected_output: A JSON object using the NEW date (June 12), not the old one. Should capture the organizer from the email signature.
assertions: The output is valid JSON or contains a valid JSON code block
The JSON contains a 'title' field mentioning 'Board Meeting' or 'Q2 Board Meeting'
The JSON contains a 'date' field referencing 'June 12' or '2025-06-12' (the rescheduled date, NOT June 5)
The JSON date field does NOT use 'June 5' as the event date
The JSON contains a 'time' field mentioning '10:00 AM' or '10:00'
The JSON contains a 'location' field mentioning '4th Floor Boardroom' or 'HQ'
The JSON contains an 'organizer' field mentioning 'James Liu'
